docs.text: dd-gmh-cli ¶ CLI for dd-gmh SYNOPSIS ¶ dd-gmh-cli token [ -u | --username <username> ] [ -q | --quiet ] dd-gmh-cli nbn write [ -q | --quiet ] [ -f | --force ] \ { <nbn> <location>... | -i | --input-file <inputFile> [ -w | --wait <waitDuration> ] } dd-gmh-cli nbn read [ -l | --only-locations ] <nbn> dd-gmh-cli nbn find <location> For more information on a subcommand use: dd-gmh-cli <subcommand> --help
docs.title: Introduction

docs.text: dd-gmh-cli token [ -u | --username <username> ] [ -q | --quiet ] dd-gmh-cli nbn write [ -q | --quiet ] [ -f | --force ] \ { <nbn> <location>... | -i | --input-file <inputFile> [ -w | --wait <waitDuration> ] } dd-gmh-cli nbn read [ -l | --only-locations ] <nbn> dd-gmh-cli nbn find <location> For more information on a subcommand use: dd-gmh-cli <subcommand> --help

docs.text: Installation ¶ Currently this project is built as an RPM package for RHEL7/CentOS7 and later. The RPM will install the binaries to /opt/dans.knaw.nl/dd-gmh-cli and the configuration files to /etc/opt/dans.knaw.nl/dd-gmh-cli . Building from source ¶ Prerequisites: Java 11 or higher Maven 3.3.3 or higher RPM Steps: git clone https://github.com/DANS-KNAW/dd-gmh-cli.git cd dd-gmh-cli mvn clean install
docs.title: Installation
